1851200.name: CS Diamantes Pipas PC : Jogo de pipa
1851200.description:
The hit kite fighting game is now available on PC!
This game is cross-platform, so you can play with your friends on mobile.

Raise your kite and challenge the best in the skies!
Engage in epic aerial battles by controlling a kite and challenging players from around the world. Show off your skills by cutting enemy lines and claiming your spot at the top. Victory depends on your angle, your line, and your technique. Do you have what it takes to conquer the skies?

Key Features:

🌟 Strategy and Aerial Combat

  • Cut enemy lines: Outsmart your opponents with precise maneuvers.

  • Collect fallen kites: Claim the trophies of your victories for rewards.

  • Cut tails: A special technique for expert players.

  • Inspired Mode: Cut through a storm of enemy kites and activate powerful bonuses!

  • Dominate the rankings: Reach the Top 3 in maps, lines, and rooms.

  • Achieve the impossible: Cut strong lines with a weaker line to gain advantages.

  • Break enemy kites: Unlock exclusive bonuses.

🎮 Intuitive and Dynamic Controls

  • Release: Loosen the line to make the kite turn gently.

  • Quick release: Quickly loosen the line to send the kite away fast.

  • Pull the line: Advance and control the direction with precision.

  • Disbique: Perform sharp and dominant moves to gain an edge in battle.

🔥 Progression and Rewards

  • Earn gold and experience to improve your skills.

  • Unlock epic combos like double, triple, quadra, penta, and hexa.

The road to greatness won’t be easy. Find the perfect combination of kite and line to become a true master of kite combat. Download now and show who rules the skies!

💡 Important:
The game uses your SteamID for data registration, which means it is not connected to the account server of the mobile version.
1851200.supported_languages:
英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 印度尼西亚语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
